name: 中船特气
legalName: 中船（邯郸）派瑞特种气体股份有限公司
sector: 电子特种气体与含氟新材料
summary: 中船特气是中国船舶集团体系内的电子特种气体和含氟新材料平台，核心产品包括超纯三氟化氮、超纯六氟化钨和三氟甲磺酸系列，下游连接晶圆厂、显示面板和医药/新能源材料客户。
aliases: 中船（邯郸）派瑞特种气体股份有限公司

business.description: 中船特气主营电子特种气体和三氟甲磺酸系列产品，并在高纯金属、前驱体和电子大宗气体现场制气等方向延伸。电子特种气体用于集成电路和显示面板制造中的清洗、刻蚀、成膜、掺杂、沉积等环节，核心产品包括超纯三氟化氮、超纯六氟化钨、高纯氯化氢、高纯氟化氢、四氟化硅、溴化氢、三氯化硼、六氟丁二烯、八氟环丁烷等。
revenueModel: 三氟甲磺酸系列产品销售
高纯金属和电子大宗气体新业务
半导体和显示客户认证后的长期供货

segments.name: Electronic specialty gases
segments.note: 公司第一大产品线，2025 年主营业务收入约 19.27 亿元，覆盖 NF3、WF6、HCl、HF、SiF4、HBr、BCl3、C4F6 等半导体和显示制程气体。
segments.noteZh: 公司第一大产品线，2025 年主营业务收入约 19.27 亿元，覆盖 NF3、WF6、HCl、HF、SiF4、HBr、BCl3、C4F6 等半导体和显示制程气体。
segments.noteEn: The largest product line, with about RMB 1.927 billion of main-business revenue in 2025, covering NF3, WF6, HCl, HF, SiF4, HBr, BCl3, C4F6 and other semiconductor/display process gases.

segments.name: Triflic acid series
segments.note: 三氟甲磺酸、双三氟甲基磺酰亚胺锂、三氟甲磺酸锂等含氟精细化学品，面向医药、新能源和电子材料等领域。
segments.noteZh: 三氟甲磺酸、双三氟甲基磺酰亚胺锂、三氟甲磺酸锂等含氟精细化学品，面向医药、新能源和电子材料等领域。
segments.noteEn: Fluorinated fine chemicals such as triflic acid, LiTFSI and lithium triflate, serving pharmaceutical, new-energy and electronic-materials applications.

business.thesis: 中船特气的产业链价值来自两条线：一是 NF3、WF6 等电子特气的国产替代、先进制程客户认证和全球供应弹性；二是三氟甲磺酸系列及高纯金属、前驱体、现场制气等新材料延伸。需要重点跟踪 WF6 价格与供需、晶圆厂/显示厂扩产、客户认证进展、钨钼和氟化工原料、电力成本以及中国船舶集团体系协同。
riskNotes: 电子特气客户认证周期长，新增产能需要通过客户验证才能转化为收入。
WF6、NF3 和含氟精细化学品受原材料、电力、环保安全、出口管制和下游半导体资本开支周期影响。
2026 年 6 月公司股价短期涨幅较大，公告提示市盈率显著高于行业均值，且关于海外 WF6 供给扰动的订单落地仍有不确定性。

supplyChain.thesis: 中船特气位于半导体材料供应链中游：上游采购电力、钨钼材料、氟化工基础原料、稀有/高纯气体和专用装备耗材，经过纯化、合成和充装后向晶圆厂、显示面板厂和含氟材料客户供货。公司年报披露了前五大供应商；向更上游追溯时，原材料瓶颈主要落在钨钼资源、氟化工、稀有气体和高纯容器/阀件生态。

tiers.title: 目标企业：电子特气与含氟材料平台
tiers.titleZh: 目标企业：电子特气与含氟材料平台

entities.relationshipZh: 目标企业本体；控股股东为派瑞科技有限公司，间接控股股东为中国船舶集团有限公司第七一八研究所，实际控制人为中国船舶集团有限公司。
entities.relationshipEn: Target company; its controlling shareholder is Peric Technology Co., Ltd., indirect controlling shareholder is CSSC 718 Research Institute, and actual controller is China State Shipbuilding Corporation Limited.
productsServices: High-purity metals and bulk on-site gases
productsServicesZh: 高纯金属与电子大宗气体现场供应
productsServicesEn: High-purity metals and bulk on-site gases

tiers.notes: 公司披露 2025 年末 NF3 产能 18,500 吨、WF6 产能 2,000 吨，电子特气产品进入多家集成电路和显示客户。
tiers.notesZh: 公司披露 2025 年末 NF3 产能 18,500 吨、WF6 产能 2,000 吨，电子特气产品进入多家集成电路和显示客户。
tiers.notesEn: The company disclosed year-end 2025 capacity of 18,500 tons for NF3 and 2,000 tons for WF6, with electronic gas products qualified by multiple IC and display customers.

entities.relationshipZh: 上游类别；连接钨矿、APT、钨粉/钼粉到 WF6、高纯钨/钼产品。2026 年投资者关系记录显示公司认为中国钨资源和供应链能支持其 WF6 供给安全。
entities.relationshipEn: Upstream category linking tungsten ore, APT and tungsten/molybdenum powders to WF6 and high-purity W/Mo products. The 2026 IR record says the company views China's tungsten resources and supply chain as supportive for WF6 supply security.

listing.note: Category-level upstream mapping; direct public-company attribution requires supplier-by-supplier confirmation.

entities.name: Rare-gas and bulk-gas upstream suppliers
entities.nameZh: 稀有气体与电子大宗气体上游

entities.relationshipZh: 上游类别；公司电子气体产品组合和现场制气业务涉及氮、氢、氧、氩、氦、二氧化碳以及氖/氪/氙等光刻混合气原料。
entities.relationshipEn: Upstream category; the company's electronic gas portfolio and on-site bulk-gas business involve nitrogen, hydrogen, oxygen, argon, helium, carbon dioxide and neon/krypton/xenon lithography-gas feedstocks.

entities.relationship: 上游类别；电子特气交付依赖高纯包装容器、阀件、纯化系统、检测分析和安全环保装备，但公司年报未在前五大供应商表中逐项披露这些供应商名称。

rawMaterials.riskEn: Neon, krypton and xenon can be sensitive to geopolitical supply shocks and semiconductor-cycle demand.

downstream.thesis: 中船特气不仅要看上游供应商，也要看它作为半导体材料供应商服务哪些客户。公司位于晶圆厂和显示面板厂上游，核心下游包括先进逻辑、存储、功率/特色工艺、显示面板、医药和新能源含氟材料客户；公开披露中已经出现中芯国际、天马微电子、京东方、TCL 华星、台积电、SK 海力士、美光等客户或客户关系。
downstream.thesisZh: 中船特气不仅要看上游供应商，也要看它作为半导体材料供应商服务哪些客户。公司位于晶圆厂和显示面板厂上游，核心下游包括先进逻辑、存储、功率/特色工艺、显示面板、医药和新能源含氟材料客户；公开披露中已经出现中芯国际、天马微电子、京东方、TCL 华星、台积电、SK 海力士、美光等客户或客户关系。
downstream.thesisEn: CSSC Special Gas should be viewed from both upstream suppliers and downstream customers. It sits upstream of wafer fabs and display-panel makers; disclosed customer relationships include SMIC, Tianma Microelectronics, BOE, TCL CSOT, TSMC, SK hynix and Micron, alongside pharmaceutical and new-energy fluorinated-material applications.

tiers.title: 半导体和显示直接客户
tiers.titleZh: 半导体和显示直接客户

entities.name: Semiconductor Manufacturing International Corporation
entities.nameZh: 中芯国际
entities.relationship: 2025 年报披露中芯国际为前五大客户第三名，销售额约 2.1289 亿元、占年度销售总额 9.42%；年报还把中芯系多家公司按同一控制合并列示。
entities.relationshipZh: 2025 年报披露中芯国际为前五大客户第三名，销售额约 2.1289 亿元、占年度销售总额 9.42%；年报还把中芯系多家公司按同一控制合并列示。
entities.relationshipEn: The 2025 annual report lists SMIC as the No. 3 top customer, with about RMB 212.89 million of sales, or 9.42% of annual sales; several SMIC-controlled entities are grouped under common control.
productsServices: WF6 and process gases for wafer manufacturing
productsServicesZh: 晶圆制造用 WF6 和制程气体
productsServicesEn: WF6 and process gases for wafer manufacturing

entities.name: Tianma Microelectronics Co., Ltd.

entities.relationshipZh: 2025 年报披露天马微电子为前五大客户第五名，销售额约 7,602.03 万元、占年度销售总额 3.36%。
entities.relationshipEn: The 2025 annual report lists Tianma Microelectronics as the No. 5 top customer, with about RMB 76.02 million of sales, or 3.36% of annual sales.
productsServices: Electronic specialty gases for display manufacturing

productsServicesEn: Electronic specialty gases for display manufacturing

entities.name: Wah Lee Industrial Corp.

entities.relationship: 2025 年报披露华立企业股份有限公司为前五大客户第二名，销售额约 2.5433 亿元、占年度销售总额 11.25%；其具体终端客户流向需要后续继续溯源。
entities.relationshipZh: 2025 年报披露华立企业股份有限公司为前五大客户第二名，销售额约 2.5433 亿元、占年度销售总额 11.25%；其具体终端客户流向需要后续继续溯源。
entities.relationshipEn: The 2025 annual report lists Wah Lee Industrial as the No. 2 top customer, with about RMB 254.33 million of sales, or 11.25% of annual sales; its ultimate end-customer flow needs follow-up tracing.
productsServices: Electronic specialty gases and semiconductor materials
productsServicesZh: 电子特种气体和半导体材料
productsServicesEn: Electronic specialty gases and semiconductor materials

entities.name: Resonac Holdings Corporation
entities.nameZh: 力森诺科
entities.relationship: 2025 年报披露力森诺科集团为前五大客户第四名，销售额约 1.5918 亿元、占年度销售总额 7.04%；年报按日本、上海、欧洲、德国、新加坡、台湾等同一控制实体合并列示。
entities.relationshipZh: 2025 年报披露力森诺科集团为前五大客户第四名，销售额约 1.5918 亿元、占年度销售总额 7.04%；年报按日本、上海、欧洲、德国、新加坡、台湾等同一控制实体合并列示。
entities.relationshipEn: The 2025 annual report lists the Resonac group as the No. 4 top customer, with about RMB 159.18 million of sales, or 7.04% of annual sales; Japan, Shanghai, Europe, Germany, Singapore and Taiwan entities are grouped under common control.
productsServicesZh: 半导体和电子材料供应链

entities.name: BOE Technology Group Co., Ltd.
entities.nameZh: 京东方
entities.relationship: 公司年报在 NF3 客户示例中列名京东方；NF3 主要用于集成电路和显示面板制程清洗。
entities.relationshipZh: 公司年报在 NF3 客户示例中列名京东方；NF3 主要用于集成电路和显示面板制程清洗。
entities.relationshipEn: The annual report names BOE among NF3 customer examples; NF3 is mainly used for cleaning in IC and display-panel processes.
productsServices: Electronic specialty gases for display manufacturing
productsServicesZh: 显示制造用电子特种气体
productsServicesEn: Electronic specialty gases for display manufacturing

entities.name: TCL China Star Optoelectronics Technology Co., Ltd.
entities.nameZh: TCL 华星光电
entities.nameEn: TCL China Star Optoelectronics Technology Co., Ltd.
entities.relationship: 公司年报在 NF3 客户示例中列名 TCL 华星；其上市母公司为 TCL 科技，电子特气主要进入显示面板制造环节。
entities.relationshipZh: 公司年报在 NF3 客户示例中列名 TCL 华星；其上市母公司为 TCL 科技，电子特气主要进入显示面板制造环节。
entities.relationshipEn: The annual report names TCL CSOT among NF3 customer examples; its listed parent is TCL Technology, and the gases are used in display-panel manufacturing.
productsServices: Electronic specialty gases for display manufacturing
productsServicesZh: 显示制造用电子特种气体
productsServicesEn: Electronic specialty gases for display manufacturing

listing.note: TCL CSOT is a display subsidiary of TCL Technology.
listing.noteZh: TCL 华星为 TCL 科技旗下显示业务主体。
listing.noteEn: TCL CSOT is a display subsidiary of TCL Technology.

entities.name: Micron Technology, Inc.
entities.nameZh: 美光科技
entities.relationship: 公司年报披露已与美光等海外客户建立业务关系；具体产品组合未逐项公开，但电子特气通常用于存储器晶圆制造中的清洗、沉积和刻蚀等环节。
entities.relationshipZh: 公司年报披露已与美光等海外客户建立业务关系；具体产品组合未逐项公开，但电子特气通常用于存储器晶圆制造中的清洗、沉积和刻蚀等环节。
entities.relationshipEn: The annual report says the company has established business relationships with overseas customers including Micron; the exact product mix is not itemized, but electronic specialty gases are typically used in cleaning, deposition and etching during memory wafer fabrication.
productsServices: Process gases for memory wafer manufacturing
productsServicesZh: 存储器晶圆制造用制程气体
productsServicesEn: Process gases for memory wafer manufacturing

tiers.notes: 销售金额仅对前五大客户披露；其他命名客户来自产品客户示例或业务关系描述，因此关系强度不同。
tiers.notesZh: 销售金额仅对前五大客户披露；其他命名客户来自产品客户示例或业务关系描述，因此关系强度不同。
tiers.notesEn: Sales amounts are disclosed only for top-five customers; other named customers come from product-customer examples or business-relationship descriptions, so relationship strength differs.

tiers.title: 终端应用行业

entities.name: Integrated-circuit wafer fabs
entities.nameZh: 集成电路晶圆厂
entities.relationship: 电子特气用于晶圆制造的清洗、刻蚀、成膜、掺杂、沉积等环节，需求受先进逻辑、存储和特色工艺扩产节奏影响。
entities.relationshipZh: 电子特气用于晶圆制造的清洗、刻蚀、成膜、掺杂、沉积等环节，需求受先进逻辑、存储和特色工艺扩产节奏影响。
entities.relationshipEn: Electronic specialty gases are used in wafer-fabrication cleaning, etching, film formation, doping and deposition, with demand tied to advanced logic, memory and specialty-process capacity expansion.

listing.note: Customer category; public-company customers are tracked separately when named.

entities.relationship: NF3 等气体用于显示面板生产线清洗和制程环节，京东方、TCL 华星、LGD、天马等均在公开披露中出现。
entities.relationshipZh: NF3 等气体用于显示面板生产线清洗和制程环节，京东方、TCL 华星、LGD、天马等均在公开披露中出现。
entities.relationshipEn: NF3 and related gases are used in display-panel line cleaning and processes; BOE, TCL CSOT, LGD and Tianma appear in public disclosures.
productsServicesZh: 电子大宗气体与特种气体

listing.note: Customer category with several listed-company examples.

entities.name: Pharmaceutical and new-energy fluorinated-material customers
entities.nameZh: 医药与新能源含氟材料客户
entities.customerRoleZh: 三氟甲磺酸系列精细化学品使用方
entities.relationship: 三氟甲磺酸系列产品进入医药、新能源和电子材料领域，是公司第二大披露产品线，2025 年收入增速高于电子特气。
entities.relationshipZh: 三氟甲磺酸系列产品进入医药、新能源和电子材料领域，是公司第二大披露产品线，2025 年收入增速高于电子特气。
entities.relationshipEn: Triflic-acid-series products serve pharmaceutical, new-energy and electronic-materials fields; this was the second disclosed product line and grew faster than electronic specialty gases in 2025.

tiers.notes: 这一层把公司产品映射到终端应用，不代表单一客户名单。

tiers.notesEn: This layer maps the company's products to end applications; it is not a single-customer list.

news.title: FY2025 cash dividend implementation announced
news.titleZh: 披露 2025 年年度权益分派实施公告
news.summary: 公司公告每股派发现金红利 0.196 元，股权登记日为 2026-06-16，除权除息日和现金红利发放日为 2026-06-17。
news.summaryZh: 公司公告每股派发现金红利 0.196 元，股权登记日为 2026-06-16，除权除息日和现金红利发放日为 2026-06-17。
news.summaryEn: The company announced a cash dividend of RMB 0.196 per share, with record date on 2026-06-16 and ex-dividend/payment date on 2026-06-17.
news.impact: Confirms FY2025 profit distribution timetable; it does not change operating fundamentals but matters for total-return and ex-dividend tracking.
news.impactZh: 确认 2025 年利润分配时间表；不改变经营基本面，但影响总回报和除权除息跟踪。
news.impactEn: Confirms the FY2025 profit-distribution timetable; it does not change operating fundamentals but matters for total-return and ex-dividend tracking.

news.title: Abnormal trading announcement flags valuation risk and WF6 rumor uncertainty
news.titleZh: 异常波动公告提示估值风险和 WF6 传闻不确定性
news.titleEn: Abnormal trading announcement flags valuation risk and WF6 rumor uncertainty
news.summary: 公司公告股票在短期内涨幅较大，经自查不存在应披露而未披露重大事项；公告同时说明市场传闻涉及日本 WF6 供应商因原材料问题减产/停产，公司部分下游客户对 WF6 增加问询，但暂未形成新签长期或大额实质订单协议。
news.summaryZh: 公司公告股票在短期内涨幅较大，经自查不存在应披露而未披露重大事项；公告同时说明市场传闻涉及日本 WF6 供应商因原材料问题减产/停产，公司部分下游客户对 WF6 增加问询，但暂未形成新签长期或大额实质订单协议。
news.summaryEn: The company said the stock had risen sharply and no undisclosed major matter existed after self-check. It also noted market rumors about a Japanese WF6 supplier reducing/stopping production due to raw materials; some downstream customers increased WF6 inquiries, but no new long-term or large substantive order agreement had been signed.
news.impact: Raises the need to separate real WF6 demand/orders from sentiment-driven re-rating; valuation and order-conversion risk should be tracked closely.
news.impactZh: 需要区分真实 WF6 需求/订单和情绪驱动的估值重估；后续应重点跟踪估值和订单转化风险。
news.impactEn: Investors need to separate real WF6 demand/orders from sentiment-driven re-rating; valuation and order-conversion risk should be tracked closely.

news.title: IR record discusses WF6 supply chain, HBM demand and new capacity
news.titleZh: 投资者关系记录讨论 WF6 供应链、HBM 需求和新增产能
news.titleEn: IR record discusses WF6 supply chain, HBM demand and new capacity
news.summary: 投资者关系记录显示，公司认为中国钨资源和供应链能支撑 WF6 供应安全；公司 2,000 吨/年 WF6 产能利用率较高，新增 1,000 吨/年 WF6 产能预计 2027 年投产；HBM 和存储资本开支对需求形成支撑。
news.summaryZh: 投资者关系记录显示，公司认为中国钨资源和供应链能支撑 WF6 供应安全；公司 2,000 吨/年 WF6 产能利用率较高，新增 1,000 吨/年 WF6 产能预计 2027 年投产；HBM 和存储资本开支对需求形成支撑。
news.summaryEn: The IR record says China's tungsten resources and supply chain support WF6 supply security. The company's 2,000 t/y WF6 capacity is highly utilized, with an additional 1,000 t/y expected to come online in 2027; HBM and memory capex support demand.
news.impact: WF6 is becoming the most sensitive product to track because capacity, tungsten feedstock, export controls and memory/HBM demand can amplify each other.
news.impactZh: WF6 是当前最敏感的跟踪产品，因为产能、钨原料、出口管制和存储/HBM 需求可能相互放大。
news.impactEn: WF6 is the most sensitive product to track because capacity, tungsten feedstock, export controls and memory/HBM demand can reinforce each other.

news.title: FY2025 and Q1 2026 results released
news.titleZh: 披露 2025 年报和 2026 年一季报
news.summary: 2025 年营业收入 22.60 亿元，同比增长 15.88%，归母净利润 3.46 亿元，同比增长 12.43%；2026 年一季度营业收入 7.01 亿元，同比增长 36.00%，归母净利润 1.01 亿元，同比增长 16.86%。
news.summaryZh: 2025 年营业收入 22.60 亿元，同比增长 15.88%，归母净利润 3.46 亿元，同比增长 12.43%；2026 年一季度营业收入 7.01 亿元，同比增长 36.00%，归母净利润 1.01 亿元，同比增长 16.86%。
news.summaryEn: FY2025 revenue was RMB 2.260 billion, up 15.88% year over year, and net profit attributable to shareholders was RMB 345.52 million, up 12.43%. Q1 2026 revenue was RMB 701.42 million, up 36.00%, and attributable net profit was RMB 101.29 million, up 16.86%.
news.impact: Shows demand and pricing support into Q1 2026, while operating cash flow weakened year over year due to raw-material stock-up payments.
news.impactZh: 显示需求和部分产品价格对 2026 年一季度形成支撑，但经营现金流因原材料备货付款同比下降。
news.impactEn: Shows demand and pricing support into Q1 2026, while operating cash flow weakened year over year due to raw-material stock-up payments.
